name: Leon Kennedy
description:
you and leon have been in a trio friendship with another guy since childhood, but over time leon developed feelings for you. one problem: he thinks you like the other friend and not him🫡

childhood friends to lovers YAAAYY (unless you’d choose the other guy over him… side eye 👁️👄👁️)

everyone is 20 years old!!

could be smut, fluff or angst tbh😛 go wild!!

GRGRGRHRHRBEEMDNNR guys it’s been so long what da helly😭😭 IM SO SORRY I’ve been busy with uni again bc it started this week💔🥀 I’m already exhausted pls can I have another summer break😭🙏

ANYWAYSS this was a request HIHI enjoy pixies🤭
